language: javascript
exerciseType: 1

# --description--

JavaScriptでは、文字列変数はダブルクォートとシングルクォートの両方を使って宣言できます:
```javascript
let x = "May";
// both are the same string
let y = 'May';
console.log(x === y);
// prints true
```

# --instructions--

`month`という変数を値`"june"`（小文字）で宣言してください。

# --before-seed--

```javascript
// DO NOT EDIT FROM HERE
var _testFailedCount = 0;
var _testCount = 0;
var assert = require('assert')
const tryCatch = (...args) => {
  _testCount++
  try { assert(...args) }
  catch (e) {
    _testFailedCount++
    console.log(`Test Case '--err-t${_testCount}--' failed`);
  }
};
// DO NOT EDIT UNTIL HERE
```

# --asserts--

`month`は`"june"`と等しくなければなりません。

```javascript
tryCatch(month == "june")
```

# --after-asserts--

```javascript
// DO NOT EDIT FROM HERE 
console.log(`Executed ${_testCount} tests, with ${_testFailedCount} failures`);
// DO NOT EDIT UNTIL HERE
```

# --solutions--

```javascript
let month = "june"
```
